Package com.amonson.logger

Class ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.amonson.logger.ZeroMQLoggingPublisher
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    EarlyInterceptLog, java.io.Closeable, java.lang.AutoCloseable
    public class ZeroMQLoggingPublisher
extends java.lang.Object
implements EarlyInterceptLog, java.lang.AutoCloseable, java.io.Closeable
    Description for class ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl)
      Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.
      ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl, boolean callTargets)
      Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.
      ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl, java.lang.String topic)
      Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.
      ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl, java.lang.String topic, boolean callTargets)
      Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void close()
      Closes the socket then context.
      boolean log​(java.util.Properties config, Level lvl, Level filterLevel, java.lang.StackTraceElement callingLocation, java.lang.String msg, java.lang.Object... args)
      Method to intercept logging process early to completely customize the logger.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

        public ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl)
        Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server. This uses a DEFAULT_TOPIC and passes true to the callTargets parameter of the complete constructor.
        Parameters:
        zeroMQUrl - The ZeroMQ formatted url to publish data to. This us usually a SUB socket

      • ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

        public ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl,
                              java.lang.String topic)
        Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server. This passes true to the callTargets parameter of the complete constructor.
        Parameters:
        zeroMQUrl - The ZeroMQ formatted url to publish data to. This us usually a SUB socket
        topic - The PUB topic all log messages are published to.

      • ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

        public ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl,
                              boolean callTargets)
        Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.
        Parameters:
        zeroMQUrl - The ZeroMQ formatted url to publish data to. This us usually a SUB socket
        callTargets - This determine whether subsequent output targets (like the default console). true indicated to make the output target calls and false indicated to skipp the calls.

      • ZeroMQLoggingPublisher

        public ZeroMQLoggingPublisher​(java.lang.String zeroMQUrl,
                              java.lang.String topic,
                              boolean callTargets)
        Create a EarlyInterceptLog version that publishes to a ZeroMQ SUB server.
        Parameters:
        zeroMQUrl - The ZeroMQ formatted url to publish data to. This us usually a SUB socket
        topic - The PUB topic all log messages are published to.
        callTargets - This determine whether subsequent output targets (like the default console). true indicated to make the output target calls and false indicated to skipp the calls.

    • Method Detail

      • log

        public boolean log​(java.util.Properties config,
                   Level lvl,
                   Level filterLevel,
                   java.lang.StackTraceElement callingLocation,
                   java.lang.String msg,
                   java.lang.Object... args)
        Method to intercept logging process early to completely customize the logger.
        Specified by:
        log in interface EarlyInterceptLog
        Parameters:
        config - The configuration passed to the logger.
        lvl - The Level of this log message.
        filterLevel - The current logger filter level of the logger.
        callingLocation - Either null or the calling stack location of an exception.
        msg - The logged message format string.
        args - The arguments for the format string.
        Returns:
        true to call output targets or false to skip calling output targets.

      • close

        public void close()
           throws java.io.IOException
        Closes the socket then context.
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.lang.AutoCloseable
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.io.Closeable
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - When the close of either close operation fails.
